ddls:
CREATE TABLE "file_types" (
  "file_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file type */,
  "file_extension" TEXT /* File extension (e.g., .dcm, .dicom, .isq) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the file type */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the file type (e.g., medical, document, image) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the file type is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the file type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the file type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "actions" (
  "action_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each action */,
  "action_name" TEXT /* Name of the action (e.g., open, save, edit) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the action */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the action is a default action */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("action_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "file_type_actions" (
  "file_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the file type */,
  "action_id" INTEGER /* ID of the action */,
  "allowed" INTEGER /* Whether the action is allowed for the file type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action was allowed */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the allowed action was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_type_id", "action_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the file */,
  "file_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the file type */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path where the file is stored */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the file */,
  "is_deleted" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the file is logically deleted */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the file */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the file */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the file was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the file was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_files_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_files_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_files_file_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_type_id") REFERENCES file_types ("file_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, editor, viewer) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the user account is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "file_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* ID of the file being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the file */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the file was accessed */,
  "action_id" INTEGER /* ID of the action performed on the file */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the file was accessed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent (e.g., browser) used to access the file */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access event occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_file_access_action_id FOREIGN KEY ("action_id") REFERENCES actions ("action_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_file_access_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_id") REFERENCES files ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_file_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "file_metadata" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* ID of the file */,
  "metadata_key" TEXT /* Key of the metadata (e.g., author, creation date) */,
  "metadata_value" TEXT /* Value of the metadata */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the metadata was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the metadata was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id", "metadata_key")
)

CREATE TABLE "file_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* ID of the file being commented on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date when the comment was made */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "is_resolved" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the comment has been resolved */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the comment was made */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the comment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_file_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_file_comments_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_id") REFERENCES files ("file_id")
)
